description: Checks that the bot saves a complete revised weekly plan when the athlete moves a workout and asks to keep the rest of the week unchanged.
user_message: Actually, my legs are pretty cooked after today. Move the Tuesday workout to Thursday and make Tuesday 5 easy. Keep the rest of the week the same.

initial_context.weekly_plan:
Monday: 5 easy
Tuesday: 8 with 4x1200m
Wednesday: 5 recovery
Thursday: 7 easy
Friday: rest
Saturday: 14 long
Sunday: 4 recovery
initial_context.training_summary: Reviewed 4 runs over the last 7 days. Recent training includes a hard workout today and normal easy mileage before it.
initial_context.recent_runs:
Recent runs:
- Tuesday workout: 8.00 mi with 4x1200m, completed today. Athlete reports legs are cooked afterward.
initial_context.training_goal: Build consistently for a fall marathon while staying healthy.
